title: Create XML Output for Weather Forecast
scenario: Write an XML output for a weather forecast. The output should contain the current temperature, forecasted high and low temperatures, and wind speed. The input will be a dictionary containing weather information.
constraints: Must be a single XML element
Must include the required weather information fields

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the XML output is syntactically valid.
Check if the XML output accurately represents the input data.
Check if the XML output correctly represents the structure of the weather information.
